_comment: Synthetic OneNote pages for Westbrook accreditation governance. ONN-002 is leadership-restricted and mirrors confidential liaison preparation.

onenote_pages.title: AACSB Reaffirmation Working Notes
onenote_pages.author: PPL-005
onenote_pages.summary: Committee working notes for assurance-of-learning evidence gaps and assigned remediation actions.
onenote_pages.content_excerpt: Open actions include rubric calibration completion, course-map evidence upload, and assessment-cycle closeout owner updates.

onenote_pages.title: Confidential Liaison Brief Prep
onenote_pages.author: PPL-001
onenote_pages.summary: Leadership prep notes for confidential liaison discussion points and escalation boundaries.
onenote_pages.content_excerpt: Prepare response framing for unresolved evidence exceptions and escalation options before liaison check-in.
